name: Easy Croissants
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the warm milk and sugar together. Add yeast. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Stir well. Add flour; beat until smooth.
3. Add milk, sugar, and egg. Beat until smooth. Add butter; beat and set aside.
4. In a large mixing bowl, place the 4 cups of flour and chilled butter. Cut the butter into the flour until pieces are the size of beans (not too small).
5. Pour the liquid batter into the flour mixture; stir until moistened. Cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
6. Remove from refrigerator. Press into a compact ball on a floured board and divide into 4 parts.
7. Roll each part into a circle, about 12 inches or 16 inches in diameter.
8. Cut each circle into 6 or 8 pie-shaped wedges.
9. For each croissant, roll a wedge towards the point. Shape into a crescent and place on an ungreased baking sheet.
10. Let rise at room temperature until doubled (may take 2 hours or more).
11. Brush each with egg beaten with cold water.
12. Preheat oven to 400°F. Place croissants in oven. Lower the temperature to 350°F and bake for 15-20 minutes until golden.
13. Makes 24-32 croissants.
